reasoning: We need to attack your lactate clearance limiter by reducing the 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power. Your last ride was primarily endurance-focused, so transitioning to over-unders will better prepare you for the Alpine Loop challenge.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6 sets of 4 min over (242-256W), 2 min under (201-218W)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
